_comment: Per-skill invocation fixtures used by skill-invocation-smoke.test.js. Each entry asserts the skill's compressed body contains every expected_substring (catches 'operative procedure replaced by TODO' — non-empty body alone is insufficient). triggers[] are documented invocation phrases — match-skills must rank the target in top-3.  Fixtures hand-authored in P0.6 alongside golden generation with reviewer sign-off (GOLDEN-VERIFIED). Skills NOT in this file are skipped (not in-scope for the optimization program).
